meta.slither_invocation: slither contracts --config-file contracts/slither.config.json --fail-low  (run from REPO ROOT; matches crytic/slither-action target=contracts, slither-version pinned 0.11.5 in CI for finding-ID parity)
meta.rebaseline_2026-07-11: slither.db.json re-keyed: the M1-11 DB was generated against pre-rebrand V3Migrator.sol; the f83967a rebrand's NatSpec edits shifted every V3Migrator function +3 lines, and Slither IDs embed node source-line mappings, so 21 of 40 entries (calls-loop x8, unused-return x4, reentrancy-events x3, reentrancy-balance x2, reentrancy-benign x2, incorrect-equality x2) got new IDs. Each was verified 1:1 identical in substance (same detector/impact/confidence, description byte-identical after stripping line numbers) to its dispositioned predecessor before re-keying; dispositions carried over verbatim, ZERO new-substance findings triaged. Entry count unchanged at 40. The M1-3 Swap/Collect event declarations added to the external interfaces produce no findings and were NOT the cause. scripts/validate.sh was also fixed to the canonical repo-root invocation (it previously ran `cd contracts && slither .`, under which the repo-root-relative triage DB silently failed to load).
meta.aderyn_invocation: aderyn -o aderyn.report.json  (run from contracts/, aderyn.toml scopes to src/)
meta.principle: Every finding carries a written disposition. None is an exploitable High+; all are false-positive or acknowledged-by-design. Detectors stay LIVE (per-instance triage in slither.db.json), so any future diff touching a suppressed site re-surfaces the finding and re-fails the gate until re-dispositioned.
meta.rebaseline_2026-07-13: slither.db.json re-keyed for the §12.63 creator-fee landing (robbed-security gate-2 re-run F-2). The two-leg fee additions to BondingCurve.buy/sell/quote* + CurveFactory setters shifted source lines, and Slither IDs embed node source-line mappings, so line-shifted entries (reentrancy-benign on BondingCurve.buy — now also lists accruedCreatorFees — and the 2 reentrancy-balance V3Migrator instances) got new IDs; all were re-keyed by (check, location) preserving their prior disposition. TWO genuinely-new findings added for CreatorVault.claim: arbitrary-send-eth [High] + missing-zero-check [Low], both dispositioned FALSE-POSITIVE (creator = fee-earner, not arbitrary; zero creator carries zero balance). DB grew 40 -> 42. Detectors stay LIVE; future code re-triggers.

config_excluded_informational_classes.naming-convention: 40 hits — deliberate UPPER_SNAKE_CASE public view getters mirroring immutables; canonical ABI names consumed by indexer/frontend (contracts.md §7.4, spec §12.38). Style, no security impact.
config_excluded_informational_classes.low-level-calls: 2 — ETH sent via .call{value:}('') with typed reverts (spec §5.4); recipients are treasury/seller/graduation-caller, each nonReentrant+CEI.
config_excluded_informational_classes.unindexed-event-address: 2 — RouterSet/MigratorSet one-time deploy-wiring admin events; not indexed.

FALSE-POSITIVE. External call is NPM.mint() to trusted immutable Uniswap NPM (§12.28, asserted at deploy). Stale bal feeds only amount*Desired + post-mint m.liquidity==0 guard (defense-in-depth). LaunchToken/WETH have no transfer hooks; swap-callback surface closed by _activePool guard which returns before mint.
dispositions.incorrect-equality [Medium] x2 (m.liquid: FALSE-POSITIVE. Exact zero-guards on integers from trusted returns / in-contract math; strict == is correct, not a balance/timestamp equality.
dispositions.reentrancy-no-eth [Medium] x2 (CurveFact: FALSE-POSITIVE. Pre-write call is to trusted immutable factory/migrator (initializePool touches only V3; recordEthDelta is a bounded accumulator). Both entrypoints nonReentrant; onlyRouter on createToken. Post-call writes are pre-computed. BondingCurve.buy CEI-ordering nuance (recordEthDelta ahead of effects) acknowledged — safe, trusted callee cannot reenter.
dispositions.uninitialized-local [Medium] x4: FALSE-POSITIVE. Ctx/MintLocals memory structs fully field-populated before read; wethArbSpent/refund are intentional 0-init uint256.
dispositions.unused-return [Medium] x11: INTENTIONAL. Router discards tuple fields re-emitted in events or unneeded by the thin router; V3Migrator slot0() partial-destructure reads only sqrtPrice/tick; pool.swap() deltas unneeded (spend via WETH balance delta, price-capped); graduate discards migrate() returns (migrator emits Graduated).
dispositions.calls-loop [Low] x8 V3Migrator arb loop: INTENTIONAL. Bounded (MAX_ARB_ITERATIONS) iterative price correction (§6.3.2) inherently calls slot0/balance/swap per iteration; trusted V3 pool/WETH; clean revert on budget exhaustion, never a hostile mint.
dispositions.reentrancy-benign [Low] x4: BENIGN (Slither classification). State-after-call to trusted factory/migrator/NPM, no attacker reentry (nonReentrant, no token hooks).
dispositions.reentrancy-events [Low] x5: FALSE-POSITIVE. Events after trusted external calls; ordering affects logs only, never funds/control-flow. Incl. LPFeeVault.collect after NPM.collect.
dispositions.timestamp [Low] x1 BondingCurve.buy: REQUIRED BY SPEC. Anti-sniper window uses block.timestamp because block.number is BANNED on Orbit (spec §2/§6.5). ~100ms blocks vs seconds-scale window → sub-second skew immaterial; acknowledged bypass is multi-wallet, not timestamp gaming.
dispositions.arbitrary-send-eth [High] x2 (Router._se: FALSE-POSITIVE. private fn, single caller = createToken creation-fee push to factoryContract.treasury() (factory-configured, never caller-supplied, §4.1); nonReentrant+CEI.  |  CreatorVault.claim(creator): FALSE-POSITIVE (§12.63) — sends the creator's OWN accrued balanceOf[creator] to that SAME creator (fee-earner, never arbitrary/caller-supplied); permissionless in caller, fixed in recipient (LPFeeVault.collect pattern); nonReentrant+CEI; a hostile creator reverts only its own claim (retriable), never a trade.
dispositions.missing-zero-check [Low] x1 CreatorVault: FALSE-POSITIVE (§12.63). Zero `creator` is unreachable-with-value: deposit() reverts ZeroAddress on a zero creator so balanceOf[address(0)]==0, and claim() guards the send with `if (amount!=0)` — a zero-balance claim sends nothing. No ETH reaches address(0); a redundant check only bloats the minimal-surface vault (§6.6).

aderyn.note: Aderyn 'high' = its detector taxonomy, not exploitability; all map to the same Slither dispositions above or are acknowledged-by-design. Aderyn is report-only (exit 0); Slither + greps are the hard gate.

dispositions.Contract locks Ether without a withdraw: ACKNOWLEDGED-BY-DESIGN. Migrator holds no resting ETH: msg.value is wrapped to WETH up-front and fully deployed into the V3 position + dust settlement in the same call. Ownerless/immutable by design (spec §6, like LPFeeVault) — a no-withdraw contract is the intended posture; only a griefer's force-sent dust could ever be stuck, never user/curve funds.
dispositions.ETH transferred without address checks [: FALSE-POSITIVE. Recipients are the factory treasury (validated non-zero at factory config) or msg.sender/seller (a live caller, never zero). No caller-supplied destination.
dispositions.Reentrancy: State change after external: FALSE-POSITIVE. Same trusted-callee + nonReentrant analysis as Slither reentrancy-no-eth. Constructor is CREATE2 one-shot (no reentry surface).
dispositions.Centralization Risk [Low] x12 CurveFacto: ACKNOWLEDGED-BY-DESIGN. Owner = Gnosis Safe (Ownable2Step); powers strictly bounded (pauseCreates/pauseBuys, fee retune within immutable ceilings for future curves, treasury pointer, beta caps). CANNOT touch live-curve economics, pause sells, upgrade, or extract from vault (contracts.md §7.3, spec §6.6). Spec-mandated admin surface.
dispositions.Large Numeric Literal [Low] x3: STYLE. Constants (BPS denom, sqrtPrice/tick). Same class as too-many-digits.
dispositions.Local Variable Shadows State Variable [L: FALSE-POSITIVE. Constructor params / CurveParameters staging-struct fields share names with the immutables they initialize; assignment context, no read of the shadowed storage before assignment. Compiler + gate-2 invariants confirm no logic error.
dispositions.Modifier Invoked Only Once [Low] x2: STYLE (onlyRouter/onlyOwner used once at current surface).
dispositions.Loop Contains require/revert [Low] x1 V3: INTENTIONAL. Same as calls-loop; bounded arb loop reverts on budget exhaustion.
dispositions.State Change Without Event [Low] x2 (gra: ACKNOWLEDGED. graduate emits Graduated via migrator; _stagedParams unstage is transient within the same tx.
dispositions.Address State Variable Set Without Check: FALSE-POSITIVE. _activePool is the transient swap-callback guard set to c.pool (already checked != address(0) at L247).
dispositions.Unchecked Return [Low] x1 V3Migrator poo: INTENTIONAL. Swap deltas unused (spend measured via WETH balance delta, price-capped to targetSqrt).
dispositions.Unused Import [Low] x1 V3Migrator:14 IUn: ROUTED to hoodpad-contracts — Informational cleanup. IV3Migrator already inherits IUniswapV3SwapCallback, so the direct import is redundant (only referenced by the @inheritdoc natspec). Non-security, non-blocking; remove only if @inheritdoc still resolves.

solhint.result: 0 errors, 285 warnings, exit 0. Load-bearing rules are error-level and PASS: compiler-version==0.8.35 (exact pin §6.7), no-global-import, gas-custom-errors, func-visibility.

warning_class_dispositions.import-path-check: FALSE-POSITIVE. solhint does not read Foundry remappings, so it cannot resolve @openzeppelin/*; the imports exist and forge build passes.
warning_class_dispositions.immutable-vars-naming / SNAKE_CASE: Deliberate — same rationale as Slither naming-convention (canonical ABI getter names).
warning_class_dispositions.use-natspec (missing @author/@notice/@re: STYLE. External-interface mirrors of Uniswap/ArbSys; non-blocking.

checks: ^0.8 / >=0.8 pragma ranges — none; single exact pin 0.8.35 (spec §6.7)
pauseSell identifier — none (only a doc-comment asserting its absence)
